title: mPER2, mCRY1 and mBMAL1 fluorescence timelapse imaging in the suprachiasmatic nucleus
content: S-BIAD1582 mPER2, mCRY1 and mBMAL1 fluorescence timelapse imaging in the suprachiasmatic nucleus Confocal timelapse imaging stacks of live, organotypic SCN brain slices expressing endogenous circadian clock protein fluorescent fusions. There are 30 minutes between each frame. The Green channel
